languages.text: "Как и полагается хорошему офицеру, Батошски. А теперь ступайте, я буду говорить с наследни{mf|ком|цей}".
"As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."
languages.original_text: "Как и полагается хорошему офицеру, Батошски. А теперь ступайте, я буду говорить с наследни{mf|ком|цей}".

traits.locale_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."
"As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."
"As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."
"As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

languages.text: "Wie es sich für einen guten Offizier gehört, Batoshski. Und jetzt geht. Ich werde mit {mf|dem Erben|der Erbin} sprechen."
languages.original_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: "Wie es sich für einen guten Offizier gehört, Batoshski. Und jetzt geht. Ich werde mit {mf|dem Erben|der Erbin} sprechen."

languages.text: « Comme se doit de le faire un bon officier, Batoshski. Sur ce, vous pouvez disposer. Je dois m'entretenir avec mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. »
languages.original_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: « Comme se doit de le faire un bon officier, Batoshski. Sur ce, vous pouvez disposer. Je dois m'entretenir avec mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. »

languages.text: «Como corresponde a un buen oficial, Batoshski. Puede retirarse. Hablaré con mi hereder{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: «Como corresponde a un buen oficial, Batoshski. Puede retirarse. Hablaré con mi hereder{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: "İyi bir subaya yakıştığı gibi üzere Batoshski. Şimdi git. Vârisimle konuşacağım."
languages.original_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: "İyi bir subaya yakıştığı gibi üzere Batoshski. Şimdi git. Vârisimle konuşacağım."

languages.text: “这才像个称职的军官，巴托什斯基。去吧。我要和继承人单独聊聊。”
languages.original_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: “这才像个称职的军官，巴托什斯基。去吧。我要和继承人单独聊聊。”

languages.text: 「いい将校にふさわしい、バトシスキー。さあ、行って。私は相続人に話しかけるわ。」
languages.original_text: "As befits a good officer, Batoshski. Now go. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: 「いい将校にふさわしい、バトシスキー。さあ、行って。私は相続人に話しかけるわ。」
